column1: // lines 166-200 (simplified) export function chunkMarkdown( content: string, chunking: { tokens: number; overlap: number }, ): MemoryChunk[] { const lines = content.split("\n"); const maxChars = Math.max(32, chunking.tokens * 4); // ~4 chars pe const overlapChars = Math.max(0, chunking.overlap * 4); // ... chunking logic ... const carryOverlap = () => { // Keep last N chars worth of lines for overlap let acc = 0; const kept = []; for (let i = current.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { acc += entry.line.length + 1; kept.unshift(entry); if (acc >= overlapChars) break; } current = kept; }; }
